MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Robert Slllards, 510.396.4577 for Plaintiff Union Espanola De California, Inc.
No other appearances.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF UNION ESPANOLA DE CALIFORNIA, INC.'s Notice Of Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Stipuation is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Plaintiff to prepare order and judgment. Order and judgment signed. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
